name: Mountain Chicken Frog
conservationEfforts: Durrell Wildlife Conservation Trust leads recovery on Dominica and Montserrat. Captive breeding in UK zoos. Anti-chytrid treatment trials in the field.
description: One of the world's largest frogs (up to 21 cm), named because locals say it tastes like chicken. Chytrid fungus has reduced populations by 80% on its remaining Caribbean islands.
